sentences.arabic: زُرْتُ الْمَكْتَبَةَ الْعَامَّةَ لِأَقْرَأَ كِتَابًا فِي الْأَدَبِ.
sentences.translation: Posjetio sam javnu biblioteku kako bih pročitao knjigu iz književnosti.
sentences.translationEn: I visited the public library to read a literature book.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدْتُ رُفُوفًا مَلِيئَةً بِالرِّوَايَاتِ وَدَوَاوِينِ الشِّعْرِ.
sentences.translation: Pronašao sam police pune romana i zbirki poezije.
sentences.translationEn: I found shelves full of novels and poetry collections.

sentences.translation: Sjeo sam u miru i počeo čitati.
sentences.translationEn: I sat in silence and started reading.

sentences.translation: Rečenice su bile veoma lake i jasne.
sentences.translationEn: The sentences were very easy and clear.

sentences.arabic: الْقِرَاءَةُ تُفَتِّحُ لَنَا أَبْوَابَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ وَالْخَيَالِ.
sentences.translation: Čitanje nam otvara vrata znanja i mašte.
sentences.translationEn: Reading opens the doors of knowledge and imagination for us.
